scenarios.summary: Identify which Element or Variation fits an open Storypoint slot given the declared MC Resolve and Crucial Element.
Determine the canonical Type-level Signpost transition at the OS Driver pivot between Acts 2 and 3.
Audit whether a draft actually pivots on its declared Crucial Element by tracing scenes where the Element or its dynamic pair activates.
Design or diagnose a character arc by mapping which Variations and Elements an archetype carries across the four Signposts.
Identify which structural terms to inspect when a draft lacks a clear Crucial Element and feels dramatically inert.
Resolve whether the same Element appearing in two parallel Storyforms creates legitimate interference or semantic collision.
Select the dynamic Element pair that drives dramatic tension between a track's Verse and Chorus sections.
Design a track bridge that flips the verse's dynamic pair, anchored to Variation parents and Class context.
Map an album's Story Driver, Outcome, and Judgment onto a track-by-track dramatic arc using Dramatica's four ending categories.
Map system architecture roles onto Dramatica archetypes to surface the Element-pair tension between two character-functions.
Determine when a refrain restating the same Element across verses is structurally valid using companion-pair vs. dynamic-pair geometry.
